evals.prompt: Set up CoSec authentication for a Fetcher instance with automatic token refresh. Configure SpaceIdProvider with space ID, CompositeToken for JWT storage in localStorage, and CoSecHeaders for auth headers. Show token refresh flow.
evals.expected_output: CoSec authentication setup with token management and automatic refresh

evals.prompt: Create a protected API service that uses CoSecInterceptor to add authentication to all requests. Show how the interceptor automatically attaches Bearer tokens and handles 401 responses with token refresh.
evals.expected_output: Protected service with CoSecInterceptor handling auth on all requests

evals.prompt: Implement a multi-space authentication scenario where different API endpoints require different space IDs. Show how to configure SpaceIdProvider and CompositeToken for this scenario.
evals.expected_output: Multi-space auth configuration with separate tokens per space
